KeyBindingDef.label: Toggle 10 Seconds to Speed
KeyBindingDef.description: Toggle the 10 Seconds to Speed feature on/off.

KeyBindingDef.label: Time speed: 1/2 (half)
KeyBindingDef.description: Set game speed to half of normal.

KeyBindingDef.label: Time speed: 1/4 (quarter)
KeyBindingDef.description: Set game speed to a quarter of normal.

KeyBindingDef.label: Time speed: 1/8 (eighth)
KeyBindingDef.description: Set game speed to an eighth of normal.
